name: Carrot Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
3. In a mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, salt, orange zest, and cinnamon.
4. In another bowl, mix the vegetable oil, egg, and sugar until combined. Beat in the pureed carrots and raisins.
5. Combine the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients.
6. Drop teaspoonfuls of dough onto the cookie sheet, spacing them well apart.
7. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Yield: 2 1/2 dozen
